definition: Ability of institutions to absorb credit market operational and climate-related losses without insolvency
measurement_note: Use capital ratios leverage loss-absorbing capacity risk-weight review and loss-recognition indicators

definition: Ability to meet short-term obligations maintain funding settle payments and withstand run dynamics
measurement_note: Use liquidity coverage stable funding deposit stability collateral needs market depth and contingency funding indicators

definition: Continuity of payment clearing settlement market data central-counterparty and operational technology systems
measurement_note: Use uptime cyber recovery settlement failure operational resilience vendor concentration and continuity metrics

definition: Ability of supervisors central banks regulators resolution authorities and institutions to identify and act on systemic risk
measurement_note: Use supervision capacity stress testing resolution plans macroprudential tools crisis protocols and enforcement metrics

definition: Extent to which households small firms underserved regions and vulnerable groups have safe financial access and shock absorption capacity
measurement_note: Use savings debt burden fair credit insurance payment access banking access small-firm liquidity and consumer protection indicators

definition: Exposure to leverage common assets contagion funding fragility non-bank risk cyber concentration climate risk and confidence-sensitive dynamics
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger macroprudential exposure review and stress testing

definition: Administrative legal political regulatory data operational and institutional burden required to implement a resilience strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger feasibility review sequencing authority review capacity planning and governance design
